SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,800.00 FILED BY GRIEST, JEAN AS TO DEFENDANT MENDENHALL, MATT GALLERIA SHADES & SHUTTERS OF PLEASANTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRIEST, JEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDENHALL, MATT GALLERIA SHADES & SHUTTERS OF PLEASANTON $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $930.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 4/30/13 TO DEFENDANT MATT MENDENHALL, "RETURN TO SENDER /NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
